title: Prof. Dr. Tarık BAYKARA’s Article Published in an International Journal
content:
Student

News

Details

Prof. Dr. Tarık BAYKARA’s Article Published in an International Journal

One of our university’s faculty members,

, has added a new publication to his academic achievements with his article published in the journal

Industry and Higher Education

.

Journal:

Industry and Higher Education

, 2025, Vol. 0(0), 1–15

DOI:

10.1177/09504222251370073

This study explores

university–industry collaborations

and the

relationship between education and the business world

, offering valuable contributions to the field. We sincerely thank Prof. Dr. Tarık BAYKARA for representing our university with his distinguished academic work.
